channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bus Shelter & Timetable, 5th May
item.description:
Hello Just sharing because I’ve seen him post it on X. I know one of the stops have been done with the new L not sure on the other side

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coronation Square, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep hole before Ford cobbles, 5th May
item.description:
On south side of Ford

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kilham Lane, Shipton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 5th May
item.description:
Couple of hundred yards before the ///stripe for J 11 A Northbound inside lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M5, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone using wheelie bins to secure parking no.6 Alstone lane, 5th May
item.description:
NO.6 Alstone lane, they are using bins to block the road so they can park their car which is unfair on other residents as there is limited parking in the area, been going on for few weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Alstone Lane, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction by unpermitted skip, scaffolding, building material on pavement

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 5th May
item.description:
PERMANENT REPAIR GIVE AND TAKE 28 PLEASE RESET X1 DAMAGED BOLLARD APPROX 1 METER HIGH which has been made safe on a 2 hour footway closure (Damaged Bollard)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 5th May
item.description:
2 HOUR GIVE AND TAKE MAKE SAFE DAMAGED BOLLARD WITH X4 BARRIERS AND SANDBAGS (Damaged Bollard)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over hanging tree, 5th May
item.description:
Outside no. 2 Lauriston park Cheltenham
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, John Moore Gardens, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of rubbish in road, 5th May
item.description:
Bins were emptied this morning and there's masses of rubbish blowing around the end of Falkland Place.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Falkland Place, Golden Valley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 5th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days footway aburt level difference 750x600x27mm stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 5th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days footway aburt level difference in old tree pit area 1000x600x50mm top soil needed (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 5th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please cut back overgrown tree branches growing outside into carriage way at base of tree back to boundary approx 1,5 metres x 3 meters (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 5th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please cut back overgrown tree branches growing outside into carriage way at base of tree back to boundary approx 2 metres x 3 meters (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 5th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please cut back overgrown tree branches growing outside into carriage way at base of tree back to boundary approx 2 metres x 3 meters (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 5th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please cut back overgrown tree branches growing outside into carriage way at base of tree back to boundary approx 3 metres x 2 meters (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 5th May
item.description:
Give and take 28. Day plus temporary footway closure please replace x1 broken rocking 750x600x20mm slab (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 5th May
item.description:
2 way stop and go carriage way pothole 900x600x50mm tarmac parch approx (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 5th May
item.description:
Give and take 28. Day plus temporary footway closure please relay x1 sunken 600x600x19mm slab (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 5th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please cut back overgrown tree branches growing outside into carriage way at base of tree back to boundary approx 1,5 metres x 3 meters (Overgrown Tree)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 5th May
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 5th May
